title: Fallout
description: I Don't Want To Set The World, On, Fire....
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/314085fede2bfc184fda2006b3f5fa40e05cd0f2.png)


![Homescreen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96b85590d1c7ab1a75951eac0bc5c582d7db2a40.png)

<details><summary>In Text</summary>



## Explore 
The post-apocalyptic world of Fallout in Minecraft with this immersive mod! 
Venture into the Wasteland Dimension, where danger lurks around every corner. 
Encounter menacing creatures like Bloodworms and RadRoaches as you scavenge for resources to survive. 

![RadRoach](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a61faf1b0d38be830a1ced53dac833f7423f587.png)


## Suit up 
In iconic Vault Armor or wield the formidable T-60 Mech Armor to protect yourself from the hazards of the wasteland. And don't forget to quench your thirst with refreshing Nuka Cola! With even more additions to discover, this mod brings the Fallout universe to life like never before in Minecraft.

![t60](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0e58245692a999aebb867bb40b28970d89f3294.png)

</details>
